targets.queryText: SELECT 'WTD' AS period, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_pct, 2) AS return_pct, ROUND(rolling_wtd_income, 0) AS income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'WoW', ROUND(rolling_wow_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_wow_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MTD', ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MoM', ROUND(rolling_mom_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mom_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QTD', ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QoQ', ROUND(rolling_qoq_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qoq_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YTD', ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_ytd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YoY', ROUND(rolling_yoy_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_yoy_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'WTD' AS period, ROUND(rolling_wtd_delta_pct, 2) AS return_pct, ROUND(rolling_wtd_income, 0) AS income FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'WoW', ROUND(rolling_wow_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_wow_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MTD', ROUND(rolling_mtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'MoM', ROUND(rolling_mom_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_mom_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QTD', ROUND(rolling_qtd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qtd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'QoQ', ROUND(rolling_qoq_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_qoq_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YTD', ROUND(rolling_ytd_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_ytd_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'YoY', ROUND(rolling_yoy_delta_pct, 2), ROUND(rolling_yoy_income, 0) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
